//: Vendored simulator engine (src/engine, forked from salinecitrine/noita-wand-simulator). Mirrors tsconfig.app.json EXCEPT noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters are relaxed: the byte-faithful port of Noita's gun.lua and the build-time-generated gun_actions table contain many intentionally write-only state mirrors and unused action-lambda params. All other strictness (verbatimModuleSyntax, erasableSyntaxOnly, null/implicit-any checks) is kept ON, so engine logic is still genuinely type-checked. See src/engine/README.md.
